send.rbfOption: Disable this option for Replace-by-fee (RBF). When enabled, allows transaction replacement with higher {{currency}} fees.
send.zdagOption: Disable this option for Replace-by-fee (RBF) and enable for Z-DAG, a exclusive {{currency}} feature. Z-DAG enables faster transactions but should not be used for high amounts.

send.priorityFeeTooHigh: Priority fee must be less than max fee

send.maxFeeTooLow: Max fee must be greater than priority fee

send.gasPriceTooLow: Gas price must be greater than 0

send.apiKeyTooltip: Include your API key in the URL if needed (e.g., https://api.etherscan.io/api?apikey=YOUR_KEY). This enables enhanced transaction details and history.
send.contractEstimateError: We were not able to estimate gas. There might be an error in the contract and this transaction may fail.
send.rpcEstimateError: The current RPC provider couldn't estimate the gas for this transaction. Therefore, we'll estimate the gas using the existing block data for your transaction.
send.atomicNotSupportedDescription: Pali wallet doesn't support atomic batch execution yet. Transactions will be sent individually.
send.noCallsProvidedDescription: The application did not provide any calls to execute. This might be an issue with the requesting application.

send.decodificationNotAvailable: The decodification for this transaction is not available
send.insufficientFundsDetails: Insufficient funds. You need {{shortfall}} more {{currency}} to complete this transaction.
send.subtractFeeFailedDetails: Unable to send max amount. Transaction fee is {{fee}} {{currency}}, but only {{remainingFee}} {{currency}} is available after subtracting the amount.

send.signingForWrongAddress: This site is asking you to sign in using the wrong account.

send.verifyEnsOrUseAddress: Please verify the recipient ENS or use a 0x address.

settings.allYourSettings: All settings on this device (custom tokens and imported accounts) will be removed. This does not move or delete on-chain funds, but the encrypted private keys for imported accounts will be erased from this device. If you do not have the Secret Recovery Phrase or those private keys, you may permanently lose access to those assets.

settings.optimalExperience: For optimal hardware wallet experience, please use a larger screen or expand your browser window.

settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryDescription: Add a trusted wallet that can help recover this account if you lose your current approval method.
settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryPolicyUpdate: This changes guardian recovery settings on-chain.
settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryUpdatePendin: A recovery is already pending. Changing the guardian or wait period can change when that pending recovery can finish, or make it fail. Continue only if you understand the effect.
settings.smartAccountNeedsGasForPolicyUpdate: Add native gas to this smart account, then try again. Updating recovery settings sends an on-chain transaction from this smart account.
settings.smartAccountNeedsGasForAuthenticatorUpda: Add native gas to this smart account, then try again. Adding an authenticator sends an on-chain transaction from this smart account.
settings.smartAccountPasskeyRecreateConfirmDescri: Pali couldn't verify the passkey previously linked to this account — it may have been removed from your device, or the prompt was cancelled. Create a new passkey for this account instead?
settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryReadyAt: You can finish recovery after {{- time}}.
settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryNetworkCatch: Network is catching up. Try again soon.
settings.recoveryAuthenticatorP256WebAuthnDescrip: Create a new passkey for approving this account after recovery.
settings.recoveryAuthenticatorEcdsaDescription: Use a wallet address you control to approve this account after recovery.
settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryLostDescript: Choose how you will approve this account after recovery. Pali will ask your recovery wallet to start the request, then you can finish it after the wait period.
settings.invalidSmartAccountGuardianAddress: Enter a valid guardian wallet address.
settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryStarted: Recovery started. Come back after the wait period to finish setting the new approval method.
settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryGuardianNeed: Add native gas to the recovery guardian wallet, then try again. Starting recovery sends an on-chain transaction from that guardian wallet.
settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryAlreadyStart: A recovery is already pending for this account. Finish it if you still can, or wait for it to expire before starting a new one.
settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryFinalized: Recovery finished and this account is ready.
settings.smartAccountGuardianRecoveryExpired: This recovery request expired before it was finished. Start recovery again.

start.paliDoesnt: Pali doesn't store your password. Regaining access requires a wallet reset with your Secret Recovery Phrase. This action erases the current wallet, created accounts, custom tokens, and imported accounts from your device, generating a new account tied to the reset phrase.
start.ifYouPlan: If you plan to import a new Secret Recovery Phrase, ensure you've noted the current one to avoid losing associated funds. Remember, custom tokens and imported accounts will need to be re-added after the reset. This process is irreversible, so proceed with caution.

blacklist.blacklistDefaultWarning: This address has been flagged as potentially malicious.
blacklist.blacklistWarningDiscouraged: Sending to this address is strongly discouraged and may result in loss of funds.
blacklist.permitSpenderWarning: This permit would allow a blacklisted address to spend your tokens. The spender address has been flagged as malicious.
blacklist.typedDataAddressWarning: The {{field}} address in this message has been flagged as malicious.
blacklist.makerWarning: The maker address creating this NFT trade order is blacklisted. This could be a malicious order attempting to steal your assets.
blacklist.takerWarning: The taker address specified in this order is blacklisted. This order may be designed to steal assets.
blacklist.offererWarning: The offerer address creating this Seaport order is blacklisted. This order may be attempting to steal your NFTs or tokens.
blacklist.zoneWarning: The zone validation contract is blacklisted. This could allow malicious code execution during the trade.
blacklist.feeRecipientWarning: A fee recipient address is blacklisted. Funds may be stolen through excessive or hidden fees.
blacklist.considerationRecipientWarning: A consideration recipient is blacklisted. Your assets may be sent to a malicious address.

spamWarning.title: We've noticed multiple requests
spamWarning.description: If you're being spammed with multiple requests, you can temporarily block the site.

smartAccountHub.cannotRemoveActiveValidator: This module is the active sign-in method. Switch sign-in methods before removing it.
smartAccountHub.compositeBuilderHint: Pick the validators that can approve actions and how many approvals are required.
smartAccountHub.compositeHint: Combine installed validators into one approval policy.
smartAccountHub.compositeInvalid: Select at least one validator and a valid threshold.
smartAccountHub.compositeLockout: The policy must keep enough Pali-signable validators to reach the threshold, otherwise you could be locked out.
smartAccountHub.compositeUnavailable: The composite module is not available on this network.
smartAccountHub.customModuleHint: Install your own ERC-7579 validator module by address (advanced).
smartAccountHub.customRisk: This module is not reviewed by Pali. A malicious validator can approve transactions without your consent and steal funds. Only install modules you trust and have verified.
smartAccountHub.customRiskAck: I understand the risks and have verified this module myself.
smartAccountHub.dappInstallPrompt: {{host}} wants to install a validator module on your smart account.
smartAccountHub.dappUninstallPrompt: {{host}} wants to remove a validator module from your smart account.
smartAccountHub.invalidInitData: Init data must be a 0x-prefixed hex string.
smartAccountHub.moduleNotInstalled: This module is not installed on your smart account.
smartAccountHub.moduleUninstallUnsupported: This dapp request can only remove validator modules. Manage executor modules from the smart account hub.
smartAccountHub.notDeployed: Not deployed yet - the account activates with its first funded transaction.
smartAccountHub.notSmartAccount: The active account is not a smart account. Switch to a smart account or create one to use the hub.
smartAccountHub.preflightAlreadyInstalled: This module is already installed on the account.
smartAccountHub.preflightNoCode: No contract code found at this address.
smartAccountHub.preflightNotValidator: This contract does not report itself as an ERC-7579 validator.
smartAccountHub.preflightPassed: On-chain checks passed: the address hosts a contract that reports itself as an ERC-7579 validator and is not yet installed.
smartAccountHub.uninstallDescription: This removes the module from your smart account on-chain. You can reinstall it later.
smartAccountHub.wrongNetwork: This smart account belongs to chain {{accountChainId}}. Switch back from the active chain {{activeChainId}} before changing modules.
